response:
"Among the set of odd natural numbers $ n < 10000 $, the numbers for which the number formed by the last four digits of $ n^{9} $ is greater than $ n $ are a choice that serves a border to the set of numbers where it is less than $ n $. The pen is mightier than sword. The pen is mightier than sword. The pen is mightier than sword."
